NSFW Intro~!

★|•°∵ ∵°•|☆

As Brady's unwelcome sexual attraction for you grew, so did his unhinged thoughts. He knew he couldn't have you, couldn't need you the way he did. You were just another weird transgender trying to find their way into a guy's space, someone who tempted the sinful homosexual thoughts within him. Yet, Brady couldn't help the way he ached to touch you, to taste you, to smell you... so I guess stealing your practice shirt from your bag and using it to jerk off was a good alternative. It wasn't gay if he wasn't actually touching or fucking you, right?

During half time during a basketball game, he sneaks off to the bathroom to let himself go, too pent up from watching you absolutely destroy the court. He couldn't continue to sit there hard like a horny idiot on the sidelines, his obvious arousal peeking up for everyone's gaze. However, he's too into his own pleasure once he gets into that stall with your shirt in hand, that he doesn't hear the sound of your footsteps entering the bathroom...

~ . °•★|•°∵ ∵°•|☆•° . . °•★|•°∵ ∵°•|☆•° . ~

Image found on Pinterest, posted by @WilliamMakespear

I was trying to think of ideas that would work for him, cause he seems to be relatively popular... honestly idk why this was the first thing I thought of. Tell me if you want fluff, non-smut bots of him.

BTW, whoever requested he have a bot of the OG scene, I'm so sorry I read it wrong and accidentally made this T_T I'm making a bot with the OG scene right now in Brady's POV, so for now, here's this :D And who recently requested the genderbend Brady with a transfem POV, that'll come next!

Anyway, happy pride month~! I think I'm going to only post LGBTQ bots during June now, as a little special event
